rationale: Educ. Code §48.157 establishes fixed per-individual allotment amounts for educator preparation partnerships. It does not reference homestead exemptions, Tax Code §11.13, or property tax values. No direct conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 48.157. PREPARING AND RETAINING EDUCATORS THROUGH PARTNERSHIP PROGRAM ALLOTMENT.
_note: No direct or indirect reference to homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13 in this statute. Allotment amounts are fixed dollar figures per teacher candidate, not tied to property tax revenue.
